market_overview.headline: Markets stuck in broad-based bear structure with 35% of stocks in Full Bear mode and major indices trading below their weekly EMAs.
market_overview.detail: Only 33% of stocks remain in bullish structures while 46% are in bearish territory. Tech-heavy QQQ and SPY both showing unstacked bearish patterns with potential for bullish EMA crosses.

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic/Semiconductor Momentum Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology and semiconductor names dominating momentum leaders with storage and networking equipment showing explosive moves. War-related defense and energy themes also gaining traction.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Minerals Lead, Tech Services Lag

strongest.note: Perfect bullish structure with all 15 names in Full Bull mode benefiting from Iran conflict oil spike
Industrial production showing resilience with defense contractors outperforming
Mixed but improving with semiconductor momentum offsetting broader tech weakness

weakest.note: Severe underperformance with cloud and software names deep in bear territory
Banking sector struggling despite potential rate tailwinds from geopolitical tensions
Complete sector breakdown with all names in bearish structures

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth tech into defensive energy and materials as Iran war drives commodity prices higher while rate-sensitive sectors lag.

items.text: Bitcoin in Full Bear structure (-12.7% vs 21W) signaling crypto winter may pressure risk assets
Technology services sector showing 91% bearish participation — avoid until structure improves
Major indices below EMAs with only crossover potential — not confirmed reversals yet
Oil spike creating stagflation risk as USPS implements 8% fuel surcharge

news_drivers.headline: What Moved Markets
news_drivers.summary: Iran conflict dominated headlines as oil prices surged 40% since Feb 28, driving energy stocks higher while creating stagflation concerns. SpaceX IPO rumors sparked space sector rally, while Trump's China visit delay and Pentagon defense contracts provided additional sector rotation catalysts.

items.text: Oil prices up 40% since Iran conflict began, boosting energy sector to perfect bullish structure
USPS implementing 8% fuel surcharge highlighting inflationary impact of war
Space stocks rallied on SpaceX IPO filing reports with AST SpaceMobile and Rocket Lab leading
Defense contractors benefiting from escalated Pentagon spending amid Iran tensions
Trump-Xi meeting delayed to May as geopolitical tensions weigh on China trade optimism
